title: SQLite runs in :memory: mode — no durable persistence
evidence: main.go:342 NewBookStore(":memory:"); schema created at main.go:42, but data is lost on every restart. REQUIREMENTS.json R7 how_to_verify: 'Persistence uses SQLite/embedded DB, not just in-memory state.'
suggestion: Open a file-backed DB (e.g. sql.Open("sqlite", "books.db")) so data survives restarts, or make the path configurable via flag/env.

title: Validation requires year beyond the title+author spec
evidence: main.go:213 validateBook rejects year==0 with 400; spec/REQUIREMENTS.json R9 only requires title and author. A spec-compliant create with no year (or year 0) is wrongly rejected — see TestCreateBook_Invalid 'missing year' at main_test.go:95.
suggestion: Drop the year!=0 check (or make it optional) so validation matches the documented contract of title+author required.

title: isbn column is NOT NULL UNIQUE though ISBN is not a required/spec field
evidence: main.go:48 'isbn TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE'; two books created without an ISBN both send isbn="", so the second collides and returns 409 (createBook UNIQUE branch, main.go:242). Spec lists isbn as an attribute, not a required/unique key.
suggestion: Allow NULL/empty ISBN (drop UNIQUE or make the column nullable) unless uniqueness is an explicit product requirement.

title: DELETE of a non-existent book returns 204, never 404
evidence: main.go:169 DeleteBook ignores RowsAffected; deleteBook always writes 204 (main.go:337). TestDeleteNonExistentBook (main_test.go:375) asserts 204.
suggestion: Optional: check RowsAffected and return 404 when no row was deleted for clearer REST semantics; current idempotent behavior is acceptable.
